description: §15.10 — the same prop name declared BOTH in the `props` block AND as a bare attribute on the component-def root element SHALL fire E-COMPONENT-012. `Badge`'s root `<span status="x" ... props={ status: string }>` declares `status` twice. Reject (pos) half of the E-COMPONENT-012 pin; clean neg is components/duplicate-prop-decl-clean.
rationale: §15.10: 'the same prop name SHALL NOT appear in both the props block and as a bare attribute on the root element (E-COMPONENT-012: duplicate prop declaration).' `status` appears as both a bare attribute value ("x") and a typed props-block entry.
